description: Design-level state management patterns and anti-patterns

entries.title: Incomplete State Machine
entries.summary: Design describes some states and transitions but not all

indicators: State diagrams with ellipsis or incomplete transitions
No terminal state definitions or failure path transitions
design_context.description: The design describes some states and transitions but not all. Missing transitions mean undefined behavior — the implementation will fill gaps with whatever the developer assumes.

entries.title: No Recovery from Stuck States
entries.summary: No specification for recovery from unexpected states

indicators: Emergency modes with no exit criteria
design_context.description: The design doesn't specify how to recover when the system enters an unexpected state. Paused contracts with no unpause path, failed migrations with no rollback.
